rules.rule: Every reusable character must be referenced by character_id and character_version.
Scene prompts may not overwrite locked identity fields; use revision workflow.
Multi-character scenes require scene_instance_id and person masks for each character.
Character-specific LoRAs require single-character scope or regional masks.
Identity proof is engine-specific; SDXL proof does not automatically prove Flux/Flux2 identity.
Promotion requires continuity QA evidence tied to output SHA256 and model stack.
